overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt exploring a medieval riverside settlement during a rainy night. The character journeys from a riverbank with a stone bridge, through a stone archway into a village courtyard, and finally enters a candlelit tavern.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside overlook with stone bridge view

events.description: rain begins falling, visible as streaks in the torchlight
character begins walking forward along the riverbank

agents.ego_description: standing by the river holding a torch, then beginning to walk along the bank toward the stone bridge

entered.detail: large stone arch bridge spanning the river in the background
wide river with flowing water reflecting the night sky
rocky embankment with grass and vegetation
tall purple wildflowers growing along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night by a river, with a large stone bridge visible in the distance. Geralt stands holding a torch, illuminating the purple wildflowers and tall grass along the bank before beginning to walk forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill trail leading to stone archway entrance

events.description: approaching the stone archway entrance to the village
passing through the stone archway into the settlement

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along a narrow dirt path flanked by stone walls and vegetation

entered.detail: ancient stone archway entrance covered in vines
large oak tree visible through the archway
crumbling stone walls alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a narrow dirt path away from the river, approaching an ancient vine-covered stone archway. The river and bridge fade from view as the character passes through the arch into the settlement area.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village courtyard with wooden fortifications

events.description: encountering villagers and NPCs in the settlement
turning to survey the village square and wooden tower

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square, observing the wooden structures and passing by villagers

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden scaffolding, observing the surroundings
villager walking near the stone wall

entered.detail: tall wooden watchtower with timber framing
wooden construction scaffolding against a building
wooden wagon cart parked in the courtyard
stone wall with crenellations surrounding the village

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a village courtyard, Geralt encounters villagers and explores the area dominated by a large wooden tower and fortifications. The character turns to survey the surroundings, passing wooden carts and scaffolding while rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway leading to tavern entrance

events.description: moving from open courtyard to covered wooden walkway
approaching and entering the tavern doorway

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden walkways, passing villagers, and approaching the tavern entrance

notable_agents.action: villager in dress walking past the character
group of villagers conversing near the walkway railing

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway through the village
stone and timber tavern with lit windows
hanging sign with emblem outside the tavern
wooden overhead structure covering part of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Geralt traverses elevated wooden walkways through the village, passing under a pergola and approaching a tavern. The character moves past villagers in period dress and enters the warm glow of the tavern doorway.

events.description: entering warm interior candlelight from the dark rainy exterior
turning to look around the tavern interior

agents.ego_description: entering the tavern and looking around at the patrons, bar, and interior furnishings

notable_agents.action: woman standing near table holding a tray
patron sitting at table near the fireplace

entered.detail: rough wooden tables with candles and tankards
long wooden bar counter with bottles
vase with red and yellow flowers on a table

segments.scene_description: Inside the candlelit tavern, Geralt moves past wooden tables where patrons sit drinking and conversing. The warm firelight replaces the cold rain outside as the character explores the interior, passing a bar area and tables adorned with flowers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a cold, rainy riverbank into the warm, candlelit interior of a village tavern. It begins with Geralt holding a torch among purple wildflowers by a river, moving away from a distant stone bridge as he ascends a narrow dirt path. As the river fades from view, the camera passes through an ancient vine-covered stone archway, emerging into a rainy village courtyard filled with wooden fortifications, carts, and scaffolding. The scene then shifts onto elevated wooden walkways and under a pergola, passing villagers in period dress before approaching a glowing doorway. Finally, the cold rain is replaced by the warm flicker of firelight as the camera enters the tavern, moving past patrons at wooden tables and a flower-adorned bar.
